3277880.name: Warped Universe
3277880.description:
The Oracle’s Call 

Reality fractures at the edge of the Warped Universe, a dreamlike cosmos where time twists, landscapes shift, and the balance of light and gravity determines all.

Summoned by the Oracle, an enigmatic AI from a lost age, you are chosen to restore order to a collapsed universe. Align with the Luminaries, expanding the unknown through radiant light, and the Foundationalists, bending gravity to forge stability. Your choices shape the battlefield, warping physics, altering environments, and shifting the course of existence itself.

But beyond the stars, the Void stirs… an ancient force of entropy that seeks to erase all.

Space at Your Pace

Warped Universe offers a blend of real-time action and turn-based strategy, allowing players to choose their preferred gameplay style for each mission. Enjoy seamless transitions between both genres, with shared weapons, skills, and mechanics.

Real-Time Action

Real-time action delivers fast-paced, third-person combat, perfect for players who thrive on quick reflexes. Jump into the action and let your instincts guide you.

Make the moment matter.

Turn-Based Strategy

Turn-based strategy offers a top-down game style, ideal for those who prefer a more tactical approach. Plan your moves carefully. Every turn counts.

On the Ground or in Space

Engage in intense combat planetside on open ground or in towering facilities, or take to the vast expanse of space for high-flying battles. Maneuver through tight corridors or navigate the stars, every mission is dynamic and full of opportunity.

Unified Combat System

Every attack–in both real-time and turn-based modes–follows the same underlying mechanics. Each hit is determined by a dice roll for balanced and consistent gameplay.

Nexus Station

The Nexus Station is the central hub for players in Warped Universe, functioning as a vibrant social, strategic, and operational base. Within the station, players will find a variety of features that enhance both gameplay and interaction. The real-time 3D solar system map allows players to track planetary progress, monitor operational facilities, and scout for regions of space to expand the Oracle’s reach.

Workstations throughout the station allow players to acquire new equipment, apply cosmetics, and add upgrades to enhance their arsenal in preparation for what lurks beyond.

Different Paths, Leading to a Singular Goal

Align with the Luminaries and Foundationalists to harness the powers of light and gravity.

Though distinct in their ideologies and approaches, both factions remain united in their ultimate goal: to navigate the challenges of the Warped Universe and forge a path forward for all its diverse inhabitants.

Seasonal Solar Systems

In Warped Universe, seasonal gameplay will keep the experience fresh and ever-changing. As players complete missions and collect Residuum, they’ll construct new planets and establish various facilities to unlock technologies, all while defending their creations from the Void’s relentless threat.

Each season introduces new solar systems, missions, and technology to explore with lore updates that bring new environments, combatants, and cosmetics.

  • Choose Your Playstyle – Seamlessly switch between real-time action and turn-based strategy in both ground and space combat.

  • Shape the Universe – Use light and gravity to alter environments dynamically, warping battlefields in real time for all.

  • Evolving Narrative – Player choices shape the universe, affecting storylines, factions, and mission outcomes.

  • A Shared Universe – Every player contributes to the season-wide meta-goal of building and defending the cosmos before time runs out.

  • Unified Combat System – Real-time and turn-based combat share the same underlying mechanics, ensuring consistency (every hit is determined by dice rolls).

  • Co-op PvE Missions – Form teams of up to four players to battle the Void across ever-changing solar systems.

  • Seasonal Content – Expanding solar systems, evolving gameplay, and new challenges every season.

  • A Warped Aesthetic – Psychedelic, painterly sci-fi visuals bring the universe to life.
